build.beforeDevCommand: npm run build:wasm:dev && npm run dev -w src-tauri/frontend
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build:wasm && npm run build -w src-tauri/frontend

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:5173 ws://localhost:5173 ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
